Off Calendar Sep-14-2012 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-08-2012 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Oct-02-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Depositions Of Steven Zhang And Anthony Teo
Off Calendar May-23-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
John Henning, Esq., from Ladva Law Firm, 415-296-8844, for Plaintiff and moving party

No other Appearance. The Tentative Ruling is adopted.
PLAINTIFF ISIDRO VALENTE'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Depositions Of Steven Zhang And Anthony Teo is Granted in part. Mr. Teo's deposition must occur no later than June 1, 2012. The motion is moot as to Mr. Zhang's deposition. Sanctions denied. Order signed in open Court.Judge: Harold E. Kahn; not reported.
